name: resourceReadiness
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler — dispatch key 'emergency-services.resourceReadiness'. Component sends { artifact: { data: { resources:{vehicles,vehiclesReady,personnel,personnelOnDuty,suppliesPercent} } } }; peeler unwraps so handler reads artifact.data.resources.*. POISON: every field coerced via intOr/finOr (Number()-based) and suppliesPercent clamped [0,100] so 'Infinity'/'1e999' never leak into suppliesLevel/overallReadiness — both stay FINITE+bounded. Render contract (overallReadiness/status headline + vehicleReadiness/personnelReadiness/suppliesLevel + shortages[]) pinned by server/tests/emergency-services-lens-macros.test.js. Authored spec, not assassin-driven.
